items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Mike Wells
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Bond Program Consent Items
Approval of Program Management Services Amendment #5 with Cumming Group (Formerly RGMK)
Taft and Adelante Selby School Reports for the 2024-2025 School Year
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy and Regulation 6020 - Parent Involvement
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of School Assignments and Committee Assignments for Board Members for the 2024-2025 School Year
Approval of Addendum to the 2024-25 Measure U Application for Clifford School
Approval of Amended and Restated Lease between Wagner Schoolhouse LLC and Redwood City School District
Approval of the Agreement between the Redwood City School District and Air Education Inc. for the 2024-2025 School Year
Acceptance of Donations
Ratification of Warrant Registers, December 1, 2024 - December 31, 2024
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Information on San Mateo County Investment Fund - November 2024
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 9.1 (Discussion of Board Policy and Regulation 6020 - Parent Involvement) was pulled from the agenda and will be brought back at a future board meeting.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I need a motion and a second to approve the consent items. I'll make a motion. One second. All in favor.

is there a motion to approve it I will make a motion to approve

uh moving on to our consent items uh number 10 do I have a motion
